summary: Implemented 6 reusable homepage content modules (features-grid, news-block, download-panel, testimonials, guild-roster, pricing-table) with deterministic seed-based selection. Each module renders themed HTML using CSS custom properties, supports German vocabulary overrides, and respects archetype/era compatibility constraints. Module selection picks 2-4 compatible modules per page via deriveSeed-isolated RNG. All 449 tests pass including 36 new US-011 tests, lint and typecheck clean.
